<Meta title="api/WidgetPlugin" />
<DocsHeader title="WidgetPlugin" breadCrumbs="API reference » WidgetPlugin" type="Type">
  
</DocsHeader>

Editor plugin type for widgets

```tsx
import { Editor, type WidgetPlugin, type ArrayNode } from "@sagold/rect-json-editor";

const ArrayWidgetPlugin: WidgetPlugin<ArrayNode> = {
  id: 'array-widget',
  use: (node) => node.type === 'array',
  Widget: ArrayWidget
};

// add widget to editor instance
const editor = new Editor({ widgets: [ArrayWidgetPlugin, ...defaultWidgets] });
```


### id


<Code>{`readonly id: string;`}</Code>


Unique id of this widget

### use


<Code>{`use: (node: JsonNode, options?: AnyOption) => boolean;`}</Code>


`use` will select this widget to render the passed JsonNode when true is returned

#### Parameter

- **`node`** JsonNode which searches for a matching widget to render
- **`options`** node options and options passed to getWidget function

#### Returns

**`boolean`** `true` if this widget should be selected to render the node
### Widget


<Code>{`Widget: WidgetComponent<N>;`}</Code>


The widget component to render
